explanation: The user instructs to pour the currently held pot (pot_0) into the sink. Since the pot is already picked up, I first need to place it in the sink basin (sinkbasin_0) to perform the pour. To pour liquid, the faucet must be turned on, so I toggle it on. After pouring, I turn it off to ensure safety and then pick up the pot again to return it to a holding state, as per standard robot behavior.
